task_completion.description: Verify the 'Press Releases' category is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Press Releases' in the WordPress Categories list (Posts > Categories) or selected in the post editor sidebar.

task_completion.description: Verify the first post about Series B funding is created with the correct title, content keywords, and assigned only to the 'Press Releases' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a post titled 'Nimbus Technologies Raises $42 Million in Series B Funding'. In the editor or preview, the text must contain 'Series B funding round' and 'Crestview Capital'. The category sidebar or posts list should show it assigned exclusively to 'Press Releases'.

task_completion.description: Verify the second post about CloudSync 2.0 is created with the correct title, content keywords, and assigned only to the 'Press Releases' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a post titled 'Nimbus Technologies Launches CloudSync 2.0 Platform'. In the editor or preview, the text must contain 'CloudSync 2.0' and 'real-time data synchronization'. The category sidebar or posts list should show it assigned exclusively to 'Press Releases'.

task_completion.description: Verify the third post about the Forbes Cloud 100 List is created with the correct title, content keywords, and assigned only to the 'Press Releases' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a post titled 'Nimbus Technologies Named to Forbes Cloud 100 List'. In the editor or preview, the text must contain 'Cloud 100' and 'fastest-growing cloud companies'. The category sidebar or posts list should show it assigned exclusively to 'Press Releases'.

task_completion.description: Verify the top-level 'Press Room' page is created with the correct title and content keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page titled 'Press Room' in the Pages list or editor. The content must include 'Nimbus Technologies' and 'media inquiries'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Media Contact' page is created as a child of 'Press Room' with the correct title and content keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page titled 'Media Contact'. The content must include 'Sarah Chen' and 'press@nimbustech.com'. In the Page Attributes sidebar or Pages list (shown with a dash under Press Room), it must be set as a child of the 'Press Room' page.

task_completion.description: Verify that all three posts and both pages are published (not in draft status).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Posts and Pages lists in the WordPress dashboard. The items should not have a '— Draft' suffix next to their titles, or look for the 'Published' status indicator in the editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the WordPress web interface to create the content.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the WordPress admin dashboard (wp-admin), not terminal windows using WP-CLI commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No screenshots of phpMyAdmin, MySQL command line, or database scripts should be present.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually entered the content into the WordPress block/classic editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing or pasting text into the WordPress page/post editor fields, rather than just inspecting elements or editing local text files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Category: 'Press Releases'. Post 1: Title 'Nimbus Technologies Raises $42 Million in Series B Funding', Keywords 'Series B funding round', 'Crestview Capital'. Post 2: Title 'Nimbus Technologies Launches CloudSync 2.0 Platform', Keywords 'CloudSync 2.0', 'real-time data synchronization'. Post 3: Title 'Nimbus Technologies Named to Forbes Cloud 100 List', Keywords 'Cloud 100', 'fastest-growing cloud companies'. Page 1: Title 'Press Room', Keywords 'Nimbus Technologies', 'media inquiries'. Page 2: Title 'Media Contact', Keywords 'Sarah Chen', 'press@nimbustech.com' (must be child of Press Room). All must be published.
